detaileddescription.para: RADMedia currently focuses on audio. It supports robust WAV parsing, WAV streaming, ALSA device enumeration, audio input/output through RADIODevice, audio playback, and decoder streams.

listitem.para: WAV and raw PCM support are the primary stable paths.
Compressed codec and resampler support are optional and depend on installed system libraries.
Devices are enumerated through ALSA on Linux.
